zh.lifeSummary: 當Felice Denston於1434年出生在英國諾福爾可貝斯索普時，她的父親William Denston24歲，母親Anne Calthorpe36歲。她於1454年與Roger Drury在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年1月12日在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德享年89歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Felice Denston于1434年出生在英国諾福爾可貝斯索普时，她的父亲William Denston24岁，母亲Anne Calthorpe36岁。她于1454年与Roger Drury在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年1月12日在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德享年89岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Denston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: locative name from Denston (Suffolk), which is recorded as Denardeston in 1220.

variants.name: Deniston
meanings: English: variant of Denston, a habitational name from either Denstone in Staffordshire (named from the Old English personal name Deni + tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ meaning ‘farmstead of a man called Deni’), or from Denston in Suffolk (from the Old English personal name Deneheard + tūn ‘farmstead of a man called Deneheard’).

nameMeanings.name: Felice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Roman family name Felix ‘lucky’. See Felix .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Felice Denston was born in 1434, in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, William Denston, was 24 and her mother, Anne Calthorpe, was 36. She married Roger Drury in 1454, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 January 1523, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Hawstead, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Felice Denston est née en 1434, à Besthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Denston, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Calthorpe, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Drury en 1454, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1523, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Felice Denston 1434 in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Denston 24 und ihre Mutter Anne Calthorpe 36. Sie hat 1454 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England Roger Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Januar 1523 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Hawstead, Suffolk, England und wurde in Hawstead, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Felice Denston è nata il nel 1434 nel Besthorpe, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William Denston, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Anne Calthorpe, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Roger Drury nel 1454, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 gennaio 1523, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Hawstead, Suffolk, England.

ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルク

ja.lifeSummary: Felice Denstonが1434年にイギリスノーフォルクベスソルペで生まれた時，父William Denstonは24歳，母Anne Calthorpeは36歳であった。1454年にイギリススフォルクハウステアドでRoger Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年1月12日にイギリススフォルクハウステアドで89歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクハウステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Felice Denston(이)가 1434년 영국 노르폴크 베스소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Denston(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Calthorpe(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1454년 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 Roger Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 1월 12일 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Felice Denston nasceu em 1434, em Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Denston, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Calthorpe, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Drury em 1454, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1523, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Felice Denston родилась в 1434 г. в местности бестаурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Denston было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Calthorpe, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Drury в 1454 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 января 1523 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Felice Denston nació en 1434, en Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Denston, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne Calthorpe, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Roger Drury en 1454, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de enero de 1523, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
